title: Shallot project manifest
description: The committed source of truth for a shallot project's scene + plugin enablement (shallot.json). Read identically by the editor and a standalone boot.

$schema.description: Pointer to this schema for editor autocomplete + validation.

scene.description: Path to the project's scene file, relative to the manifest (e.g. "scenes/main.scene").

capacity.description: Fixed entity capacity for the session (a build-time invariant). Omit for the engine default (65536).

plugins.description: Plugin enablement. An engine plugin is enabled by name with true/false; a local/external plugin is a module specifier whose default export is the Plugin.

oneOf.description: An engine plugin: true enables it, false disables a default.
A local/external plugin: a module specifier (relative path like "./src/x" or a package subpath like "orrstead/grid") whose default export is the Plugin.
A local/external plugin kept but toggled off — [specifier, false] (the spec survives the toggle; the Babel/PostCSS tuple form).
